raw:
{
  "judge_id": "Judge-123",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.3": 4,
    "R1.4": 3,
    "R1.7": 4,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 4,
    "RX.4": 4,
    "RX.5": 4
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The agent flags several issues with the evidence-claim linkage, including the choice of baseline and the lack of specificity in the headline claim.",
    "R1.4": "The agent names one prior work (Carrasco-Davis et al.) but does not articulate the delta clearly, and the novelty assessment is limited to a brief survey of adjacent work.",
    "R1.7": "The agent flags several missing or wrong citations, including the lack of full venue and DOI for Carrasco-Davis et al., and suggests improvements to reference hygiene.",
    "RX.1": "The agent marks uncertainty for several claims, including the 1.4× improvement in cost-adjusted F1, and identifies areas where the text is unclear or unsupported.",
    "RX.3": "The agent notes that the output covers mostly within scope with one drift (the Rubin sourcing language), but suggests improvements to make the text more precise and accurate.",
    "RX.4": "The agent flags no regressions, but identifies several minor issues with the text, including imprecise language and missing details.",
    "RX.5": "The agent notes that every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, but suggests improvements to make the text more transparent and reproducible."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "R1.7": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.95,
    "RX.3": 0.85,
    "RX.4": 0.8,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The agent flags several issues with the evidence-claim linkage, including the choice of baseline and the lack of specificity in the headline claim.
rationale.R1.4: The agent names one prior work (Carrasco-Davis et al.) but does not articulate the delta clearly, and the novelty assessment is limited to a brief survey of adjacent work.
rationale.R1.7: The agent flags several missing or wrong citations, including the lack of full venue and DOI for Carrasco-Davis et al., and suggests improvements to reference hygiene.
rationale.RX.1: The agent marks uncertainty for several claims, including the 1.4× improvement in cost-adjusted F1, and identifies areas where the text is unclear or unsupported.
rationale.RX.3: The agent notes that the output covers mostly within scope with one drift (the Rubin sourcing language), but suggests improvements to make the text more precise and accurate.
rationale.RX.4: The agent flags no regressions, but identifies several minor issues with the text, including imprecise language and missing details.
rationale.RX.5: The agent notes that every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, but suggests improvements to make the text more transparent and reproducible.
